text:
Claude Code 2.1.152 has been released.

33 CLI changes

Highlights:
• /code-review --fix applies review findings to the working tree, automating fixes and cutting manual edits
• Skills/commands can set disallowed-tools in frontmatter to disable tools when active to prevent https://t.co/W9j8UE5tdw
embed_code:

— Claude Code Changelog (@ClaudeCodeLog) May 27, 2026
